calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-23-2014 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-15-14 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 206 for Court Trial.
Dept.611, Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.

Plaintiff Frank Black and Defendant Rory Talley are present in pro per.
The Court and parties conference privately in chambers.
After conference with the parties, case settled. Terms of settlement placed in writting by the court and signed by the parties, but not enter into the record.
The Court orders the matter off the trial calendar and place on the CRC Dismissal calendar for July 15, 2014 at 10 a.m. in Dept. 610.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT Norman Nayfach; Clerk: M. Olopernes; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff in pro per Frank Black is present.
Defendant Rory Talley is present.
Attorney Candy Smallwood appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAR-10-2014 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
